entities.name: Systemic Dominance
entities.context: Industry power concentration understood as 'scar tissue' of historical exclusion, a lagging indicator of past barriers

entities.name: Historical Exclusion
entities.context: Being barred from existing power centers, forcing groups to build alternative infrastructure

entities.name: Parallel Institutional Infrastructure
entities.context: Alternative systems built by excluded groups that eventually become new centers of gravity

entities.name: Forced Autonomy
entities.context: Condition created by exclusion that produces high-density networks and specialized knowledge

entities.name: Outsider Efficiency
entities.context: Competitive advantage gained by parallel institutions through concentrated effort

entities.name: Internal Cohesion
entities.context: Network strength and unity within excluded groups

entities.name: Scarcity of Opportunity
entities.context: Powerful engine for infrastructure creation when talented groups are excluded

entities.name: Jewish Hospitals
entities.context: Historical example of parallel institutional infrastructure built due to exclusion

entities.name: Independent Film Studios
entities.context: Example of parallel systems that outcompeted original exclusionary institutions

relationships.context: Exclusion forces creation of alternative systems when groups lack access to power centers
Parallel systems eventually outcompete original institutions and become new power centers
Lack of alternatives creates high-density networks and specialized knowledge
